title: pedilonum vexillarius
side_effects: Pedilonum vexillarius can have side effects if used improperly, such as dizziness, nausea, and headaches due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to the plant's extracts can also lead to liver damage and increased heart rate. In severe cases, improper use of Pedilonum vexillarius may cause respiratory failure, seizures, and even coma. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using the plant for any health purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
